# ee656_cousre_project
# Deepfake detector (real vs. fake face classifier)
This project trains a CNN to classify a single face photo as **real** or **fake (deepfake/GAN-generated)**.
**Pipeline:** dataset -> preprocessing -> model (EfficientNet-B0, transfer learning) -> training -> evaluation -> inference on your own photo.
**Dataset used:** [140k Real and Fake Faces](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/xhlulu/140k-real-and-fake-faces) (real faces from FFHQ/Flickr, fake faces generated by StyleGAN). It's already split into `train/valid/test`, each with `real/` and `fake/` subfolders — perfect for `torchvision.datasets.ImageFolder`.
Works on **Kaggle notebooks** (GPU, dataset can be added directly) or **Google Colab** (GPU, dataset downloaded via Kaggle API).
